document.title: 1320 S2 Soul Mirror Content Asset Database v2 EN
document.module: S2 Soul Mirror / 灵魂镜像
document.purpose: Standalone S2 Soul Mirror content asset database for NOVA lookup and Awareness Layer report rendering.

positioning.module_function: S2 Soul Mirror reflects relational mirror patterns, attraction dynamics, recurring interpersonal lessons, emotional triggers, and the way relationships may reveal unconscious material.
positioning.important_boundary: S2 is not relationship destiny, compatibility verdict, soulmate proof, breakup advice, reconciliation advice, or a command about another person. It is a symbolic mirror for observing relational patterns.

calculation_dependency.range: S2-01 to S2-50 in legacy source; valid Gregorian birth dates normally produce S2-02 to S2-43.

nova_rendering_rule.lookup_behavior: NOVA calculates S2, looks up the matching S2-XX entry, and renders the approved fields.
allowed_generation: Short bridge sentence from S1 or positioning disclaimer into the S2 section.
Brief integration summary using retrieved content only.
must_not_generate: Do not create a new S2 relationship archetype from scratch.
Do not tell users to stay, leave, divorce, reconcile, pursue, block, or confront someone as a command.
Do not present S2 as compatibility proof, soulmate confirmation, karmic destiny, or relationship prediction.
Do not judge another person as good, bad, toxic, destined, or spiritually assigned based on S2.

content.name: 灵魂镜像
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：安全感镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：内在小孩的修复与边界练习。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 对方触发你最深层的安全感议题。
content.karmic_loop: 害怕被抛弃与害怕被亲近来回摆动。
content.lesson: 建立来自自身的安全，而不是来自关系。
content.healing_path: 内在小孩的修复与边界练习。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你不是缺乏安全感，你是在找回力量。
content.mirror_essence: 对方触发你最深层的安全感议题。

content.name: 灵魂镜像
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：控制镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：专注当下，而不是预设未来。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 双方互相试图掌控情绪、节奏或方向。
content.karmic_loop: 愤怒与委屈循环。
content.lesson: 放下控制，练习信任。
content.healing_path: 专注当下，而不是预设未来。
content.wisewave_guidance: 控制是恐惧的外衣，信任才是力量。
content.mirror_essence: 双方互相试图掌控情绪、节奏或方向。

content.name: 灵魂镜像
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：自我价值镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：断开比较、羞耻、讨好。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 对方让你看见自我否定或自我怀疑。
content.karmic_loop: 期待别人证明你的价值。
content.lesson: 价值是存在本身，而不是被认可。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你的价值从未被减少，只是被遮住。
content.mirror_essence: 对方让你看见自我否定或自我怀疑。

content.name: 灵魂镜像

content.healing_path: 觉察第一反应背后的恐惧。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你看到的不是对方，是你未看见的自己。
content.mirror_essence: 双方将自己害怕的部分投射到对方身上。

依恋是灵魂想回家的方式。


《S2 Mirror Path · Training File（21–50）》

content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：付出镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：回到平衡的能量交换。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 总是由一方付出较多。
content.karmic_loop: 无条件付出 → 被忽略 → 受伤 → 更付出。
content.lesson: 停止用付出来换取价值。
content.wisewave_guidance: 真正的爱不需要证明。
content.mirror_essence: 总是由一方付出较多。

content.name: 灵魂镜像

content.name: 灵魂镜像

content.lesson: 尊重节奏差异。
content.healing_path: 从“需要结果”回到“需要真实”。
content.wisewave_guidance: 关系不是同步，而是相遇。
content.mirror_essence: 关系进度不一致，一方快一方慢。

content.name: 灵魂镜像
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：自我怀疑镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：重建自我信任。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 关系触发你的深度自我怀疑。
content.karmic_loop: 怀疑 → 回避 → 更怀疑。
content.lesson: 看见怀疑背后的恐惧不是你。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你怀疑的不是关系，是自己。
content.mirror_essence: 关系触发你的深度自我怀疑。

content.name: 灵魂镜像
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：承诺镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：让承诺从自由选择中生长。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 对方的承诺议题触发你的不安。
content.karmic_loop: 想要承诺 → 越要求对方越退缩。
content.lesson: 承诺不能被要求，只能被选择。
content.healing_path: 让承诺从自由选择中生长。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你值得被选择，而不是被说服。
content.mirror_essence: 对方的承诺议题触发你的不安。

content.name: 灵魂镜像
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：投入恐惧镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：慢慢打开，而非强迫前进。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 害怕投入太深、太快。
content.karmic_loop: 退缩 → 渴望 → 再退缩。
content.lesson: 觉察投入恐惧是保护机制。
content.healing_path: 慢慢打开，而非强迫前进。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你不需要一次走到终点。
content.mirror_essence: 害怕投入太深、太快。

content.name: 灵魂镜像
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.reflective_summary: 此灵魂镜像反映的关系模式围绕：灵魂伴侣镜像。邀请用户觉察关系如何映照未满足的需求、投射、边界或成长边缘。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：在爱中承担自己的成长。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.relationship_dynamic: 对方激活你灵魂最深的成长课题。
content.karmic_loop: 亲密 → 触发 → 分离 → 更深连接。
content.lesson: 灵魂伴侣不是完美，而是觉醒。
content.healing_path: 在爱中承担自己的成长。
content.wisewave_guidance: 他不是来给你答案，而是来点亮你的真相。
content.mirror_essence: 对方激活你灵魂最深的成长课题。
